# Copilot Instructions

This is a Next.js App Router project using TypeScript and Tailwind CSS v4.

- Keep the site as a polished Romanian brand landing page for a fictional Bucharest dental clinic.
- Preserve the reference-inspired visual language: stark white header, black CTA buttons, large photographic hero, black-to-blue editorial sections, no rounded card-heavy SaaS styling.
- Prefer semantic HTML, accessible labels, responsive layouts, and realistic Romanian copy.
- Use Tailwind utilities first, with global CSS only for shared tokens, keyframes, and hard-to-express visual treatments.
- Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build` before claiming the implementation is complete.
